mapper.update: INSERT INTO company (corporate_number, name, kana, name_en, postal_code, location, process, aggregated_year, status, close_date, close_cause, kind, representative_name, capital_stock, employee_number, company_size_male, company_size_female, business_summary, company_url, founding_year, date_of_establishment, qualification_grade, update_date, updated_at, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.corporate_number) s.corporate_number, s.name, s.kana, s.name_en, s.postal_code, s.location, s.process, s.aggregated_year, s.status, s.close_date, s.close_cause, s.kind, s.representative_name, s.capital_stock, s.employee_number, s.company_size_male, s.company_size_female, s.business_summary, s.company_url, s.founding_year, s.date_of_establishment, s.qualification_grade, s.update_date, NULL, now(), false FROM stg_company s WHERE s.corporate_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.corporate_number, s.update_date DESC NULLS LAST ON CONFLICT (corporate_number) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, kana = EXCLUDED.kana, name_en = EXCLUDED.name_en, postal_code = EXCLUDED.postal_code, location = EXCLUDED.location, process = EXCLUDED.process, aggregated_year = EXCLUDED.aggregated_year, status = EXCLUDED.status, close_date = EXCLUDED.close_date, close_cause = EXCLUDED.close_cause, kind = EXCLUDED.kind, representative_name = EXCLUDED.representative_name, capital_stock = EXCLUDED.capital_stock, employee_number = EXCLUDED.employee_number, company_size_male = EXCLUDED.company_size_male, company_size_female = EXCLUDED.company_size_female, business_summary = EXCLUDED.business_summary, company_url = EXCLUDED.company_url, founding_year = EXCLUDED.founding_year, date_of_establishment = EXCLUDED.date_of_establishment, qualification_grade = EXCLUDED.qualification_grade, update_date = EXCLUDED.update_date, updated_at = now(), deleted = false WHERE company.name IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.name OR company.kana IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.kana OR company.name_en IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.name_en OR company.postal_code IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.postal_code OR company.location IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.location OR company.process IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.process OR company.aggregated_year IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.aggregated_year OR company.status IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.status OR company.close_date IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.close_date OR company.close_cause IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.close_cause OR company.kind IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.kind OR company.representative_name IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.representative_name OR company.capital_stock IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.capital_stock OR company.employee_number IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.employee_number OR company.company_size_male IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.company_size_male OR company.company_size_female IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.company_size_female OR company.business_summary IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.business_summary OR company.company_url IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.company_url OR company.founding_year IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.founding_year OR company.date_of_establishment IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.date_of_establishment OR company.qualification_grade IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.qualification_grade OR company.update_date IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.update_date OR company.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM false

INSERT INTO item_info (merge_key, value, is_industry, deleted, inserted_at) SELECT DISTINCT ON (md5(norm_text(value) || '|' || norm_bool(is_industry))) md5(norm_text(value) || '|' || norm_bool(is_industry)), value, is_industry, false, now() FROM stg_company_item WHERE value IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE item_info.deleted = true

INSERT INTO base_info (merge_key, average_continuous_service_years_type, average_continuous_service_years_male, average_continuous_service_years_female, average_continuous_service_years, average_age, month_average_predetermined_overtime_hours, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, average_continuous_service_years_type, average_continuous_service_years_male, average_continuous_service_years_female, average_continuous_service_years, average_age, month_average_predetermined_overtime_hours, false FROM stg_base_info WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE base_info.deleted = true

INSERT INTO women_activity_info (merge_key, female_workers_proportion_type, female_workers_proportion, female_share_of_manager, gender_total_of_manager, female_share_of_officers, gender_total_of_officers, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, female_workers_proportion_type, female_workers_proportion, female_share_of_manager, gender_total_of_manager, female_share_of_officers, gender_total_of_officers, false FROM stg_women_activity WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE women_activity_info.deleted = true

INSERT INTO compatibility_of_childcare_and_work (merge_key, number_of_paternity_leave, number_of_maternity_leave, paternity_leave_acquisition_num, maternity_leave_acquisition_num, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, number_of_paternity_leave, number_of_maternity_leave, paternity_leave_acquisition_num, maternity_leave_acquisition_num, false FROM stg_compat_childcare WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE compatibility_of_childcare_and_work.deleted = true
TRUNCATE TABLE stg_company_workplace_parts
INSERT INTO stg_company_workplace_parts (corporate_number) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number FROM stg_company WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL

UPDATE stg_company_workplace_parts p SET base_info_id = x.base_info_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (sbi.corporate_number) sbi.corporate_number, bi.base_info_id FROM stg_base_info sbi JOIN base_info bi ON bi.merge_key = sbi.merge_key WHERE sbi.corporate_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sbi.corporate_number) x WHERE p.corporate_number = x.corporate_number

UPDATE stg_company_workplace_parts p SET women_activity_info_id = x.women_activity_info_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (swa.corporate_number) swa.corporate_number, wi.women_activity_info_id FROM stg_women_activity swa JOIN women_activity_info wi ON wi.merge_key = swa.merge_key WHERE swa.corporate_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY swa.corporate_number) x WHERE p.corporate_number = x.corporate_number

UPDATE stg_company_workplace_parts p SET compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id = x.compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (scc.corporate_number) scc.corporate_number, cc.compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id FROM stg_compat_childcare scc JOIN compatibility_of_childcare_and_work cc ON cc.merge_key = scc.merge_key WHERE scc.corporate_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scc.corporate_number) x WHERE p.corporate_number = x.corporate_number

UPDATE stg_company_workplace_parts SET merge_key = md5( COALESCE(base_info_id::text, '∅') || '|' || COALESCE(women_activity_info_id::text, '∅') || '|' || COALESCE(compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id::text, '∅') ) WHERE base_info_id IS NOT NULL OR women_activity_info_id IS NOT NULL OR compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO workplace_info (merge_key, base_info, women_activity_info, compatibility_of_childcare_and_work, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, base_info_id, women_activity_info_id, compatibility_of_childcare_and_work_id, now(), false FROM stg_company_workplace_parts WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE workplace_info.deleted = true

UPDATE company c SET workplace_info = w.workplace_info_id, updated_at = now(), deleted = false FROM stg_company_workplace_parts p JOIN workplace_info w ON w.merge_key = p.merge_key WHERE c.corporate_number = p.corporate_number AND p.merge_key IS NOT NULL AND ( c.workplace_info IS DISTINCT FROM w.workplace_info_id OR c.deleted IS DISTINCT FROM false )

INSERT INTO patent (merge_key, patent_type, registration_number, application_date, title, url, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, patent_type, registration_number, application_date, title, url, false FROM stg_patent WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE patent.deleted = true

INSERT INTO classification (merge_key, code_value, code_name, japanese, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, code_value, code_name, japanese, false FROM stg_classification WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE classification.deleted = true

INSERT INTO certification (merge_key, date_of_approval, title, target, government_departments, category, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, date_of_approval, title, target, government_departments, category, false FROM stg_certification WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE certification.deleted = true

INSERT INTO subsidy (merge_key, date_of_approval, title, amount, target, government_departments, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, date_of_approval, title, amount, target, government_departments, false FROM stg_subsidy WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE subsidy.deleted = true

INSERT INTO commendation (merge_key, date_of_commendation, title, target, category, government_departments, note, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, date_of_commendation, title, target, category, government_departments, note, false FROM stg_commendation WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE commendation.deleted = true

INSERT INTO procurement (merge_key, date_of_order, title, amount, government_departments, note, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, date_of_order, title, amount, government_departments, note, false FROM stg_procurement WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE procurement.deleted = true

INSERT INTO finance (merge_key, accounting_standards, fiscal_year_cover_page, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, accounting_standards, fiscal_year_cover_page, false FROM stg_finance WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE finance.deleted = true

INSERT INTO major_shareholder (merge_key, name_major_stakeholders, shareholding_ratio, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, name_major_stakeholders, shareholding_ratio, false FROM stg_major_shareholder WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE major_shareholder.deleted = true

INSERT INTO management_index (merge_key, period, net_sales_summary_of_business_results, net_sales_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, operating_revenue1_summary_of_business_results, operating_revenue1_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, operating_revenue2_summary_of_business_results, operating_revenue2_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, gross_operating_revenue_summary_of_business_results, gross_operating_revenue_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, ordinary_income_summary_of_business_results, ordinary_income_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_premiums_written_summary_of_business_results_ins, net_premiums_written_summary_of_business_results_ins_unit_ref, ordinary_income_loss_summary_of_business_results, ordinary_income_loss_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_income_loss_summary_of_business_results, net_income_loss_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, capital_stock_summary_of_business_results, capital_stock_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_assets_summary_of_business_results, net_assets_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, total_assets_summary_of_business_results, total_assets_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, number_of_employees, number_of_employees_unit_ref, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT ON (merge_key) merge_key, period, net_sales_summary_of_business_results, net_sales_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, operating_revenue1_summary_of_business_results, operating_revenue1_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, operating_revenue2_summary_of_business_results, operating_revenue2_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, gross_operating_revenue_summary_of_business_results, gross_operating_revenue_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, ordinary_income_summary_of_business_results, ordinary_income_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_premiums_written_summary_of_business_results_ins, net_premiums_written_summary_of_business_results_ins_unit_ref, ordinary_income_loss_summary_of_business_results, ordinary_income_loss_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_income_loss_summary_of_business_results, net_income_loss_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, capital_stock_summary_of_business_results, capital_stock_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, net_assets_summary_of_business_results, net_assets_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, total_assets_summary_of_business_results, total_assets_summary_of_business_results_unit_ref, number_of_employees, number_of_employees_unit_ref, false FROM stg_management_index WHERE merge_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY merge_key ON CONFLICT (merge_key) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE management_index.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_item (company_id, info_id, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, i.info_id, false FROM stg_company_item s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN item_info i ON i.merge_key = md5(norm_text(s.value) || '|' || norm_bool(s.is_industry)) WHERE s.value IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (company_id, info_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_item.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_patent (company_id, patent_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, p.patent_id, now(), false FROM stg_patent s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN patent p ON p.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, patent_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_patent.deleted = true

INSERT INTO patent_classification (patent_id, classification_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT p.patent_id, c.classification_id, now(), false FROM stg_classification s JOIN patent p ON p.merge_key = s.patent_merge_key JOIN classification c ON c.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (patent_id, classification_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE patent_classification.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_certification (company_id, certification_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, e.certification_id, now(), false FROM stg_certification s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN certification e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, certification_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_certification.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_subsidy (company_id, subsidy_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, s2.subsidy_id, now(), false FROM stg_subsidy s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN subsidy s2 ON s2.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, subsidy_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_subsidy.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_commendation (company_id, commendation_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, e.commendation_id, now(), false FROM stg_commendation s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN commendation e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, commendation_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_commendation.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_procurement (company_id, procurement_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, e.procurement_id, now(), false FROM stg_procurement s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN procurement e ON e.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, procurement_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_procurement.deleted = true

INSERT INTO company_finance (company_id, finance_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT c.company_id, f.finance_id, now(), false FROM stg_finance s JOIN company c ON c.corporate_number = s.corporate_number JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (company_id, finance_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE company_finance.deleted = true

INSERT INTO finance_shareholder (finance_id, major_shareholder_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT f.finance_id, ms.major_shareholder_id, now(), false FROM stg_major_shareholder s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.finance_merge_key JOIN major_shareholder ms ON ms.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (finance_id, major_shareholder_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE finance_shareholder.deleted = true

INSERT INTO finance_management (finance_id, management_index_id, inserted_at, deleted) SELECT DISTINCT f.finance_id, m.management_index_id, now(), false FROM stg_management_index s JOIN finance f ON f.merge_key = s.finance_merge_key JOIN management_index m ON m.merge_key = s.merge_key ON CONFLICT (finance_id, management_index_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = false WHERE finance_management.deleted = true
